zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Stafford於1355年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布時，他的父親John de Stafford53歲，母親Margaret Stafford25歲。他於1373年與Maud Hastings結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1404年在英國倫敦被列為member of parliament for staffordshire。他去世於1410年3月1日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Stafford于1355年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布时，他的父亲John de Stafford53岁，母亲Margaret Stafford25岁。他于1373年与Maud Hastings结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1404年在英国倫敦被列为member of parliament for staffordshire。他去世于1410年3月1日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾布洛姆斯格洛福享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Stafford was born in 1355, in Chebsey, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Stafford, was 53 and his mother, Margaret Stafford, was 25. He married Maud Hastings in 1373. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1404, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as member of parliament for staffordshire in London, England. He died on 1 March 1410, in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Stafford est né en 1355, à Chebsey, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Stafford, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Maud Hastings en 1373. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1404, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament for staffordshire à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 1 mars 1410, à Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Stafford 1355 in Chebsey, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Stafford 53 und seine Mutter Margaret Stafford 25. Er hat 1373 Maud Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1404, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament for staffordshire in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. März 1410 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Stafford è nato il nel 1355 nel Chebsey, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Stafford, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stafford, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Maud Hastings nel 1373. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1404, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament for staffordshire nel London, England. Morì il 1 marzo 1410, nel Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Staffordが1355年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェブセイで生まれた時，父John de Staffordは53歳，母Margaret Staffordは25歳であった。1373年にMaud Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1404年，49歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はmember of parliament for staffordshireと記録されている。彼は1410年3月1日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアブロムスグローブで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Stafford(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체브시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Stafford(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stafford(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1373년 Maud Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1404년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 member of parliament for staffordshire이었다. 그는 1410년 3월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 브롬스그로브에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Stafford nasceu em 1355, em Chebsey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Stafford, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stafford, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Hastings em 1373. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1404, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament for staffordshire em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1 de março de 1410, em Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Stafford родился в 1355 г. в местности шебси, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Stafford было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Hastings в 1373 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1404 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament for staffordshire в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 1 марта 1410 г. в местности бромсгров, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Stafford nació en 1355, en Chebsey, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Stafford, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Margaret Stafford, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Maud Hastings en 1373. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1404, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament for staffordshire en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 1 de marzo de 1410, en Bromsgrove, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años.
